author: makortel
body:
#### PR description:

In https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/issues/50302#issuecomment-3999594783 the `SiPixelDigitizerAlgorith::init()` was found to do something expensive, and being the main cause for the processing of first event to take ~17 minutes. This PR brings that processing time down to 15 seconds (the time spent in `SiPixelDigitizerAlgorith::init()` alone went from 1719 seconds to 1.29 seconds, as measured by VTune, so 1332x speedup).

In the case of https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/issues/50302
* `quality_map->size()` was 90034
* `m_probabilities->size()` was 150
* `m_probabilities` contained 83112 that would end up in `allScenariosInProb` in https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/blob/f7b5e3683e09d30114605c952a56fb9e084c97fb/SimTracker/SiPixelDigitizer/plugins/SiPixelDigitizerAlgorithm.cc#L129

The main idea of this PR is to avoid copying, and replace the linear search
https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/blob/f7b5e3683e09d30114605c952a56fb9e084c97fb/SimTracker/SiPixelDigitizer/plugins/SiPixelDigitizerAlgorithm.cc#L140
by leveraging the `quality_map` to be `std::unordered_map`.

Resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/1992

#### PR validation:

The job in https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/issues/50302#issuecomment-3999594783 technically runs.

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Probably to be backported down to 15_0_X.
title: Speed up `SiPixelDigitizerAlgorithm::init()`
